description: Heap-UAF in JitScript->ICScript machinery. csectype-uaf, sec-high. JitScript::purgeStubs read jemalloc-poison from a freed ICScript bytecode-size slot — the iteration over inactive ICScripts walked through a stale pointer because purgeInactiveICScripts did not use the forEachICScript helper that consults the up-to-date scope. Reported as duplicate of bug 1871947; jdemooij verified the bug 1871947 patch fixes this same reproducer. Fix: git d2fc02524025 'Bug 1871947 - Use forEachICScript in purgeInactiveICScripts' (Phabricator D197603). Single-file 1-line change in js/src/jit/JitScript.cpp. Reporter (nth10sd) attached repro + ASAN poison trace.

fixes.description: Bug 1871947 - Use forEachICScript in purgeInactiveICScripts. r=iain (covers 1871618, marked dup of 1871947)
fixes.covers_bug: 1871618 (filed before 1871947; canonical fix landed under sibling bug)
